titles.en: Reward of starting from home wearing a turban
Reward of starting from home wearing a turban

segments: : ضَمِنْتُ لِمَنْ یَخْرُجُ مِنْ بَیْتِهِ مُعْتَمّاً أَنْ یَرْجِعَ إِلَیْهِمْ سَالِماً.
arabic.text: : ضَمِنْتُ لِمَنْ یَخْرُجُ مِنْ بَیْتِهِ مُعْتَمّاً أَنْ یَرْجِعَ إِلَیْهِمْ سَالِماً.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan from Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Ali b. Ziyad from a man from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I guarantee that one who leaves the house wearing a turban will return safe and sound to his family.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan from Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Ali b. Ziyad from a man from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I guarantee that one who leaves the house wearing a turban will return safe and sound to his family.”

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارِ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ زِیَادٍ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ

titles.en: Reward of starting from home wearing a turban

segments: حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الدِّهْقَانِ عَنْ دُرُسْتَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلِ ع قَالَ: أَنَا الضَّامِنُ لِمَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ بَیْتِهِ یُرِیدُ سَفَراً مُعْتَمّاً تَحْتَ حَنَکِهِ أَلَّا یُصِیبَهُ السَّرَقُ وَ الْغَرَقُ وَ الْحَرَقُ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الدِّهْقَانِ عَنْ دُرُسْتَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلِ ع قَالَ: أَنَا الضَّامِنُ لِمَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ بَیْتِهِ یُرِیدُ سَفَراً مُعْتَمّاً تَحْتَ حَنَکِهِ أَلَّا یُصِیبَهُ السَّرَقُ وَ الْغَرَقُ وَ الْحَرَقُ.

segments: 2. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far from Muhammad b. Isa from Abdillah al-Dahqan from Durust from Ibrahim from Abi al-Hassan the first (a.s.) who said: “I guarantee that one who leaves his house wearing a turban will remain safe from theft, drowning and burning (to death).”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 2. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far from Muhammad b. Isa from Abdillah al-Dahqan from Durust from Ibrahim from Abi al-Hassan the first (a.s.) who said: “I guarantee that one who leaves his house wearing a turban will remain safe from theft, drowning and burning (to death).”
